---
title: "Data Analysis Assignment 3"
subtitle: "COMM 7370 | Spring 2026"
format:
  pdf:
    geometry: 
      - top=.75in
      - left=.8in
      - right=.8in
    urlcolor: blue
  html:
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
    theme: sandstone
---

In this assignment, we will replicate the data analysis from the publication below.

> Yeo, S. K., Su, L. Y.-F., Cacciatore, M. A., Zhang, J. S., & McKasy, M. (2023). The differential effects of humor on three scientific issues: Global warming, artificial intelligence, and microbiomes. International Journal of Science Education, Part B, 13(1), 59–83. https://doi.org/10.1080/21548455.2022.2123259

Find the journal article and download the data (`humor-data.csv`) from Canvas and codebook from OSF (link in manuscript). Replicate one of the regression models in the article. Interpret your results in your own words and check whether your interpretation aligns with that of the journal article.
